title: Project File Structure Reorganization
description: Reorganize the Neuron Chrome extension's file and folder structure to improve navigation, maintainability, and consistency — without introducing build tools, new dependencies, or splitting existing files.

stories.title: Separate vendored libraries from project utilities
acceptanceCriteria: Rename lib/ to vendor/ containing only third-party code: bootstrap/, chart.min.js, idb.min.js
Move lib/date_utils.js to shared/js/date-utils.js (rename underscore to hyphen)
Move lib/module_factory.js to shared/js/module-factory.js (rename underscore to hyphen)
Update all references in manifest.json content_scripts and web_accessible_resources
Verify no broken references remain by searching all .js and .html files for old paths

stories.title: Rename files with underscores inside modules to use hyphens
acceptanceCriteria: Rename all files in modules/ouvidoria/tratar-novo/ from underscores to hyphens
Rename files in modules/ouvidoria/tramitar/ from underscores to hyphens
Rename files in modules/sic/tratar/ from underscores to hyphens
Rename files in modules/sic/analisar/ from underscores to hyphens
Update all references in manifest.json to use the new filenames
Search all .js and .html files for old filenames and update any internal references

stories.title: Organize images folder by purpose
acceptanceCriteria: Create images/icons/ subfolder
Move extension icon files into images/icons/: neuron128.png, neuron64.png, neuronoff128.png, neuronon128.png
Keep non-icon assets (e.g., Intro-Neuron.gif) at the images/ root
Update manifest.json icon references (icons, action.default_icon) to use images/icons/ path
Update any HTML or JS files that reference icon paths

stories.title: Update manifest.json web_accessible_resources
acceptanceCriteria: Replace lib/* and lib/bootstrap/* entries with vendor/* and vendor/bootstrap/*
Ensure shared/* still covers the moved utility files
Verify the extension loads without errors after all path changes

stories.title: Verify extension functionality after restructure
acceptanceCriteria: Run a full-text search for every old path and confirm zero references remain
Confirm no manifest errors would occur
Confirm all file references are valid
